name: web-research
purpose: Collect current or external evidence for research, news, source-backed summaries, and fact verification.
activationGuidance: Use when the user explicitly asks to search, research, look up, verify, compare sources, or collect citations.
Use for time-sensitive claims, latest progress, market/news questions, or follow-up questions that require fresh evidence.
Do not use for simple conversation or when existing observations already fully answer the user.

finalAnswerRequirements: cite source titles and URLs from observations
separate strong findings from weak or off-topic results
state limitations when source coverage is insufficient

qualityChecks: at least one non-empty external source observation for fresh research
do not claim search success when sources are empty
re-query with broader or more targeted terms when results are weak
